testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > renders the users admin table and drives search, pagination, creation, and selection
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > renders user create and disable dialogs with validated output payloads
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > drives role admin list, clone/create dialog, deletes, and system-role guard
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > renders role create dialog and emits create versus clone payloads
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > drives group admin list, create dialog, delete, and search branches
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > renders group create dialog and trims optional description
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > loads and saves user detail overview, memberships, and lifecycle actions
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > loads and saves role and group detail overview forms
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > filters, mutates, and saves the permission matrix
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > loads and saves group roles and members editors
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > renders effective permissions, filters grant sources, refreshes, and handles empty input
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > records component error branches without weakening assertions
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers dialog validation, clone initial state, and optional payload fields
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers admin navigation, close, and dialog error branches
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers role admin close, clone guard, load, clone, and create failures
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers role and group detail guard, load, save, and fallback error branches
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers user detail no-id guards and every save/load failure callback
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers group role and member editor reset, removal, no-id, and error branches
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers permission matrix synthetic permissions, no-id save, and fallback errors
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers effective permission fallback normalization, source fallbacks, and load errors
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers remaining fallback translation and default-value branches
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > covers remaining detail and editor translation fallbacks
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > userDisplayName joins firstName + lastName with a single space (kills L19 StringLiteral)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > userDisplayName falls back to email when no name parts are present
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > userDisplayName filters out empty string parts (kills MethodExpression .filter mutant)

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > statusKey concatenates the literal "iam.users.status." prefix with status (kills StringLiteral on prefix)

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > statusKey defaults to "active" when user.status is falsy (kills StringLiteral on the "active" fallback)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > search() resets pageIndex to 0 (kills BooleanLiteral / ArithmeticOperator on the reset path)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > clearSearch() resets the search input to empty string (kills StringLiteral on reset value)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > load() applies Math.max(0, page.meta.page - 1) — kills the Math.min mutant
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > load() applies Math.max(0, page.meta.page - 1) — kills the ArithmeticOperator + 1 mutant
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > load() omits the q param entirely when search box is empty (kills BooleanLiteral on q ? {q} : {})
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > load() trims whitespace from the search query before sending (kills BooleanLiteral on trim path)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > successful createUser pushes the exact toast key + level
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > failed createUser sets createError to the exact fallback i18n key, not empty string
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > failed load() sets error to the exact fallback key

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > error path with Error instance uses error.message verbatim (kills ConditionalExpression on the type-guard)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > closeCreateDialog respects the createSaving guard (kills BlockStatement {} mutation)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — mutation-killing assertions > openCreateDialog clears createError and opens the dialog (kills StringLiteral on the reset)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > sourceTypeKey returns the exact `iam.effectivePermissions.source.<type>` key
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > emptyTitleKey switches between empty and emptySearch variants based on the search term

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > emptyDescriptionKey switches between empty and emptySearch variants based on the search term
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > clearSearch() resets the search form to empty string
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > applySearch() trims the search input before applying the filter

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > applySearch() trims a whitespace-only input down to empty, falling back to the non-search empty key (kills MethodExpression .trim drop)

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > empty-search shows ALL permissions (kills BlockStatement {} on the includesSearch early-return)

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > EffectivePermissionsComponent — mutation-killing assertions > search matching by permission key returns only matching entries (kills BlockStatement / StringLiteral on the searchable-parts construction)

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — constructor + initial-state kills > constructor invokes the initial load() with empty q AND default page=1,pageSize=10 (kills BlockStatement {} on the constructor body + StringLiteral on the form default)
@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — constructor + initial-state kills > clearSearch() preserves the searchForm default q value after explicit setValue

@stynx-web/angular-iam component TestBed specs > UsersAdminComponent — constructor + initial-state kills > openDetail emits userSelected EXACTLY when a user is opened (kills BlockStatement {} on openDetail body)
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > exposes a host-facing provider and defensive IAM route factory
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > wraps every IAM SDK endpoint and updates list caches
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > patchRole hits the exact /admin/roles/<id> URL and updates roles state with the patched record
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > patchGroup hits the exact /admin/groups/<id> URL and updates groups state with the patched record
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > deleteRole hits the exact /admin/roles/<id> URL (kills StringLiteral mutation on the delete-role template)
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > deleteGroup hits the exact /admin/groups/<id> URL (kills StringLiteral mutation on the delete-group template)
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > omits empty query options while preserving explicit tenant scope
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > returns defensive IAM route copies with permission metadata
@stynx-web/angular-iam API and routes > allows and denies route activation through the IAM permission guards
angular-iam routes > activates each IAM admin route for users, roles, and groups when permissions allow
angular-iam routes > redirects denied IAM route activation to the configured permission-denied route
StynxEffectivePermissionsComponent > loads effective grants, filters by grant source, refreshes, and clears search state
StynxGroupCreateDialogComponent > validates required fields and emits trimmed optional description
StynxGroupDetailComponent > loads a group and saves overview changes without blank descriptions
StynxGroupMembersEditorComponent > filters available users, toggles membership, and emits saved user ids
StynxGroupRolesEditorComponent > loads group roles, toggles assignment, and emits saved role ids
StynxGroupsAdminComponent > filters groups, creates, deletes, and navigates to group detail
StynxPermissionMatrixComponent > filters permissions, toggles grants, selects resources, and saves changes
StynxRoleCreateDialogComponent > emits create and clone payloads with optional description trimming
StynxRoleDetailComponent > loads a role, saves overview changes, and identifies system roles
StynxRolesAdminComponent > filters roles, creates, clones, deletes non-system roles, and navigates to detail
StynxUserCreateDialogComponent > validates form input and emits a trimmed create payload
StynxUserDetailComponent > loads user detail and persists overview, role, group, and lifecycle actions
StynxUserDisableConfirmDialogComponent > renders the target user and emits confirm or dismiss actions
StynxUsersAdminComponent > renders user rows and drives search, pagination, creation, and selection
